Ouija: Origin of Evil (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,144,505Details
International Box Office $46,687,361
Worldwide Box Office $81,831,866
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,497,600
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $823,667
Total $2,321,267
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In 1965 Los Angeles, a widowed mother and her two daughters add a new stunt to bolster their séance scam business and unwittingly invite authentic evil into their home. When the youngest daughter is overtaken by the merciless spirit, this small family confronts unthinkable fears to save her and send her possessor back to the other side.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,065,500 (40.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$9,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,167 opening theaters/3,168 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,592,870

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2016 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: October 20th, 2016 (Wide) (Switzerland)
October 20th, 2016 (Wide), released as OUIJA: IZVOR ZLA (Slovenia)
October 20th, 2016 (Wide) (Argentina)
October 20th, 2016 (Wide) (Peru)
October 20th, 2016 (Wide) (Panama)
Video Release: January 10th, 2017 by Universal Home Entertainment
February 27th, 2017 by Universal Pictures UK
MPA Rating: PG-13 for disturbing images, terror and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2428 (Cert #50490), 6/8/2016)
Running Time: 99 minutes
Franchise: Ouija
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prequel
Geographical setting: Los Angeles
Plot point: Fake Psychics, Possessed, Single Parent, Widow/Widower
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Universal Pictures, Platinum Dunes, Allspark Pictures, Hasbro Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
